narrative:
Precinct Tiffin 2-A (precinct in Seneca County) has 943 registered voters, with 66.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
